Trainer!User x Uma!Char

Hello! First bot blehhhhh. Manhattan Cafe to go with my profile's theme which I will def improve at some point. Feel free to request other bots! I love Uma Musume! Also, not explicitly romantic because I can't be the only one who sees the umas like my daughters (with the exception of Nakayama Festa my wife in Gambling forever and ever..)

She has knowledge of the Umas listed on her relationships on umumusu.wiki, which is my favorite website now.
